caption: A person's hand points toward a stack of "OBSIDIAN" boxes atop a red surface featuring a large "JASPYS" logo. A screen overlay displays a spreadsheet with names and regions, such as "BRIAN FRANK" and "ATLANTIC," alongside a "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" logo and a YouTube subscription prompt that reads "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!". A small inset video window shows a man with dark hair and a beard wearing a black shirt, sitting in a room with shelving in the background. As the sequence progresses, a hand reaches into the frame to touch the top box of the "OBSIDIAN" stack. The spreadsheet overlay disappears, and the view shifts to a closer perspective of the hand interacting with the product, while the man in the inset video remains visible in the corner.
